targets.queryText: SELECT holdings_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT holdings_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND risk_quality_category = 'excellent';
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND risk_quality_category = 'excellent';

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND risk_quality_category = 'good';
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND risk_quality_category = 'good';

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND risk_quality_category IN ('acceptable', 'concerning');
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND risk_quality_category IN ('acceptable', 'concerning');

targets.queryText: SELECT vol_30d_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT vol_30d_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT cvar_95_1d_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT cvar_95_1d_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT max_drawdown_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT max_drawdown_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT cvar_to_income_ratio AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT cvar_to_income_ratio AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight_pct, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk_quality, ROUND(var_95_1d_pct, 2) AS var_95, ROUND(cvar_95_1d_pct, 2) AS cvar_95, ROUND(max_drawdown_1y_pct, 1) AS max_dd, ROUND(vol_30d_pct, 1) AS vol_30d FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY cvar_95 DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight_pct, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk_quality, ROUND(var_95_1d_pct, 2) AS var_95, ROUND(cvar_95_1d_pct, 2) AS cvar_95, ROUND(max_drawdown_1y_pct, 1) AS max_dd, ROUND(vol_30d_pct, 1) AS vol_30d FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY cvar_95 DESC;
